daos 0.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • Guides
    • Reading many files at once
    • Less fiddling with file paths
    • Lightweight data validation with checkpoints
    • From PDF accounts to a tidy dataset
    • Responsible use of the CVR functions
    • Browsing a statbank by keyboard
    • Task management as part of production

Package index

General utilities

f()
String interpolation shorthand
nowf()
Formatted timestamp for now
shh()
Suppress messages and warnings
is_blank()
Test whether a value is "blank"
`%??%`
Extended null-coalescing operator
`%like%`
Regex matching with NA preservation

File workflow

read_files()
Read one or more files
summon()
Retrieve objects matching a pattern from an environment
read_ta()
Read a Greenlandic TA file
write_ta()
Write a Greenlandic TA file
write_excel()
Write data frames to a presentable Excel file
append_excel()
Append sheets to an existing Excel file

Data wrangling

view_types()
Compare column types across data frames
flag_duplicates()
Flag duplicate rows
expect_empty()
Assert that a data frame is empty
drop_all_na()
Drop all-NA rows and/or columns
split_by()
Split a data frame into a named list by grouping columns
find_signs()
Find sign combinations that sum to a target

Interactive

screen_timeseries()
Interactive time-series screening dashboard
browse_files()
Browse the filesystem and copy paths to R

Domain-specific

add_cpr_info()
Add information derived from Danish CPR numbers
clean_cpr()
Standardise CPR numbers
clean_cvr()
Standardise CVR numbers
dbdot()
Format DB07 industry codes with dots
read_ta()
Read a Greenlandic TA file
write_ta()
Write a Greenlandic TA file

File readers

read_access()
Read data from a Microsoft Access database
read_xbrl()
Read an XBRL file
accounts_pdf_to_txt()
Convert PDF files to text files
accounts_txt_to_xlsx()
Parse formatted text files and export to Excel

CVR annual reports

cvr_query()
Build an Elasticsearch query for CVR annual reports
cvr_search()
Send a query to the CVR distribution service
cvr_hits()
Extract CVR search hits as a tibble
cvr_download()
Download CVR documents

Task manager

task_app()
Task manager app
task_db()
Create or open a shared task database
task_add()
Add a task
task_cycle()
Register a production cycle as a chain of steps
task_list()
List tasks
task_get()
Get one or more tasks by id
task_require()
Require tasks to have a given status
task_blockers()
Why a task is blocked
task_start() task_stop()
Start or stop work on a task
task_step()
Run a production step under a task
task_done()
Complete a task
task_reopen()
Reopen a task
task_delete()
Delete a task
task_purge()
Permanently delete tasks
task_modify()
Modify a task
task_annotate()
Annotate a task
task_annotations()
Annotations of a task
task_projects()
Project overview for managers
task_people()
People overview
task_bottlenecks()
Bottlenecks: the tasks blocking the most others
task_activity()
Recent activity across the database

Greenland Statbank

statbank_app()
Interactive explorer for the Greenland Statbank
statbank_get()
Download a table from a statbank
statbank_meta()
Get the metadata for a statbank table
statbank_search()
Search statbank tables by title
statbank_tables()
List every table in a statbank
statbank_nodes()
List one level of a statbank table tree

RStudio addins

addin_fix_path()
RStudio addin: fix Windows paths
addin_flip_backslash()
RStudio addin: flip backslashes in selection
addin_open_in_explorer()
RStudio addin: open path in file explorer
addin_paste_path()
RStudio addin: paste path from clipboard
addin_text_to_vector()
RStudio addin: convert lines to R character vector

On this page
